description: Letter from Yosef b. David b. Yeshaʿyahu mentioning a suftaja that he had received from Nahray b. Nissim, which he reports as follows: "I received from my lord Abū Yaḥyā Nahray b. Nissim the money of this suftaja. Its amount in weighed coin [...] dinars, half of that being 25 dinars. I gave him a receipt for that, a receipt of full payment."
tags: trade, Nahray B. Nissim, suftaja, Arabic address
description_he: מכתב מיוסף בן דוד בן ישעיהו על קבלת סופטג'ה (שטר חליפין) מנהריי בן נסים.
